description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Test that runs on push to the master branch and on a daily schedule. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on macos-latest, ubuntu-latest, and windows-latest, installing Meson and Ninja, checking out the repository, building and testing with Meson, and releasing artifacts for each OS. On Windows, also install Cppcheck, OpenCppCoverage, and wkhtmltopdf, configure MSVC, and generate a code coverage report.
